name: Arizer XQ2 Remote Control
summary: Easily customise your Arizer XQ2 vaping experience with the remote control.
description: Easily customise your Arizer XQ2 vaping experience with the remote control. Choose from 3 fan speeds, program temperature presets, and access frequently used settings with the touch of a button. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
